After n proofs: rep = (5000 * 0 + 10000 * n) / n = 10000 (from proof 1 onward for         the moving average formula: first proof immediately sets it to 10000, subsequent         proofs maintain it)."},"test_deregister_emitsEvent()":{"notice":"Deregistration emits ProverDeregistered event"},"test_deregister_revertsIfNotActive()":{"notice":"Deregister by a non-registered address or already-deregistered prover reverts"},"test_deregister_success()":{"notice":"Deregister returns stake to prover and sets active = false"},"test_register_emitsEvent()":{"notice":"Registration emits ProverRegistered with correct parameters"},"test_register_excessStake()":{"notice":"Register with excess stake (above minStake), verify full msg.value stored"},"test_register_reRegistration()":{"notice":"Deregister then re-register the same address -- verify clean state"},"test_register_revertsIfAlreadyActive()":{"notice":"Re-registering while active reverts with ProverAlreadyRegistered"},"test_register_revertsIfInsufficientStake()":{"notice":"Registration below minStake reverts with InsufficientStake"},"test_register_success()":{"notice":"Register with exact minStake, verify all ProverInfo fields"},"test_slash_capsAtAvailableStake()":{"notice":"Slashing more than available stake only takes what is available"},"test_slash_deactivatesIfBelowMinStake()":{"notice":"Slashing below minStake deactivates the prover"},"test_slash_reducesStake()":{"notice":"Slash reduces stake by the specified amount"},"test_updateReputation_failure()":{"notice":"Failure reduces reputation by FAILURE_PENALTY (500)"},"test_updateReputation_revertsIfNotCoordinator()":{"notice":"Non-coordinator cannot call updateReputation"},"test_updateReputation_success_degradedLatency()":{"notice":"Latency between target and ceiling yields a partial latency score.         midpoint = target + (ceiling - target) / 2 = target + target*2 = target*3         latencyScore = 10000 * (ceiling - mid) / (ceiling - target)                      = 10000 * (5*target - 3*target) / (5*target - target)                      = 10000 * 2 / 4 = 5000         After one proof: newRep = (5000*0 + 5000) / 1 = 5000"},"test_updateReputation_success_perfectLatency()":{"notice":"Perfect latency (<= targetLatencyMs) yields MAX_REPUTATION latency score.         After one successful proof: newRep = (5000 * 0 + 10000) / 1 = 10000"}},"notice":"Comprehensive unit and fuzz tests for targetSenders().details: Returns sender allowlist configured via `targetSender` (empty means no sender allowlist).

testFuzz_register_anyStakeAboveMin(uint2.notice: Any stake above minStake should produce a valid registration

testFuzz_reputation_convergesToLatencySc.notice: After multiple successful proofs, reputation should converge toward the latency score.         With perfect latency (score = 10000), the weighted moving average converges to 10000.         After n proofs: rep = (5000 * 0 + 10000 * n) / n = 10000 (from proof 1 onward for         the moving average formula: first proof immediately sets it to 10000, subsequent         proofs maintain it).

test_deregister_revertsIfNotActive().notice: Deregister by a non-registered address or already-deregistered prover reverts

test_deregister_success().notice: Deregister returns stake to prover and sets active = false

test_register_emitsEvent().notice: Registration emits ProverRegistered with correct parameters

test_register_excessStake().notice: Register with excess stake (above minStake), verify full msg.value stored

test_register_reRegistration().notice: Deregister then re-register the same address -- verify clean state

test_register_revertsIfAlreadyActive().notice: Re-registering while active reverts with ProverAlreadyRegistered

test_register_revertsIfInsufficientStake.notice: Registration below minStake reverts with InsufficientStake

test_register_success().notice: Register with exact minStake, verify all ProverInfo fields

test_slash_capsAtAvailableStake().notice: Slashing more than available stake only takes what is available

test_slash_deactivatesIfBelowMinStake().notice: Slashing below minStake deactivates the prover

test_slash_reducesStake().notice: Slash reduces stake by the specified amount

test_updateReputation_success_degradedLa.notice: Latency between target and ceiling yields a partial latency score.         midpoint = target + (ceiling - target) / 2 = target + target*2 = target*3         latencyScore = 10000 * (ceiling - mid) / (ceiling - target)                      = 10000 * (5*target - 3*target) / (5*target - target)                      = 10000 * 2 / 4 = 5000         After one proof: newRep = (5000*0 + 5000) / 1 = 5000

test_updateReputation_success_perfectLat.notice: Perfect latency (<= targetLatencyMs) yields MAX_REPUTATION latency score.         After one successful proof: newRep = (5000 * 0 + 10000) / 1 = 10000
